label: Bathroom & Kitchen

seo.title: Bathroom & Kitchen Systems for Ghana Villa Projects | Decoropic
seo.description: Modern bathroom vanity systems with artificial stone tops, smart LED mirrors, and hydro-massage tubs — sourced direct for Accra villa renovations.

hero.lead: Three modern vanity systems (artificial stone + solid wood + smart LED mirror), one 2-person hydro-massage bathtub, one premium configuration — designed to be ordered as a system, not piece by piece.

items.title: Sold as systems, not parts
items.body: Each vanity bundles top + cabinet + mirror + LED + soft-close hardware. One PO, one shipment.

items.title: Tested against Ghana mains pressure
items.body: Tap mechanisms and shower controls spec'd for Accra Ghana Water Company supply.

items.title: Replacement parts pre-stocked
items.body: Decoropic carries 18-month replacement inventory for every system listed.

applications: Master bathroom — V043 and V040 wider configurations with double basins, LED mirror spanning full width.
Guest bathroom — V036 and V030 compact configurations balanced for standard 2.4 m ceiling height.
Master bath relaxation zone — WET005 corner tub installed on the window wall, separate from the shower walk-in.
